title: Infinity Parkour
description:
Want to play parkour Forever? Here it is, 
jump jump jump!
body:
# Inf Parkour
Its a parkour datapack that makes it soo you can JUMP FOREVER. automatic generating parkour!

- count score
- top score
- checkpoints
- fun (I think)

Start by doing:
**/function game:start**

End by doing:
**/function game:end**

Enjoy!
